task: Find the cheapest used hatchback car listing in Madison which has black interiors with a heated seat option and premium sound system.
thoughts: I need to accept the cookie banner first, then set up the search for used hatchback cars in Madison.
The cookie banner is still showing. Let me click the "Accept all cookies" button more precisely.
Cookie banner is dismissed. Now I need to set up the search. First, let me change the "New/used" dropdown to "Used".
I see the select popup event. Let me select "Used" (index 3).
Good, "Used" is now selected. I need to change the Make to "All Makes" since we're looking for any hatchback. Let me click on the Make dropdown.
I see the Make dropdown opened with options. Let me select "All makes" (index 0).
The ZIP field is now cleared. Let me type the Madison, WI ZIP code.

The ZIP is set to 53703 (Madison, WI) and it shows 6,831 matches. Now let me click the "Show 6,831 matches" button to search, and then I'll apply filters for hatchback body style, black interior, heated seats, and premium sound system on the results page.

I'm on the search results page showing "Used vehicles for sale near Madison, WI" with 6.6K results. Now I need to apply filters. I can see the filter sidebar on the left. I need to scroll down to find the body style filter to select "Hatchback". Let me scroll down in the filter panel.
I can see the filter panel with Condition and Make sections. I need to scroll down more to find the body style filter.
I can see more filter options. I see Make, Model, Trim, Year, Price, Deal rating sections. I need to keep scrolling to find the Body style filter.
I can see the "Body style" filter. Let me click on it to expand it.
The Body style filter is now expanded. I can see SUV, Truck, Sedan options. I need to scroll down a bit to find "Hatchback".
I can see "Hatchback" at the bottom of the visible area. Let me click on it to select it.

I can see the results have changed - now showing hatchback cars like Honda Civic Sport, MINI Hardtop Cooper S, Honda Civic EX, FIAT 500 Sport, etc. I need to scroll down to see if the "Hatchback" checkbox is selected and to find more filters. Let me scroll down to see the Hatchback checkbox and confirm it's checked.

I can see "Hatchback (184)" is checked with a blue checkbox. Now I need to find more filters for interior color (black) and features (heated seats, premium sound system). Let me scroll down further to find those filters.
I can see "Interior color" filter at the bottom. Let me click on it to expand it and select "Black".
The Interior color filter is now expanded. Let me scroll down to see the color options and select "Black".
I can see the Interior color section with "Black (136)" option. Let me click on "Black" to select it.

"Black (136)" is now checked. I can see the results are already filtering - showing cars with black interiors. Now I need to find the "Features" filter to select "Heated Seats" and "Premium Sound System". Let me scroll down to find the features filter.

I can see the Performance section with Fuel type, Transmission, Drivetrain, Cylinders, and EV range filters. I need to keep scrolling to find the Features section where I can select "Heated Seats" and "Premium Sound System".

I can see the "Features" section with subcategories: Convenience, Entertainment, Exterior, Safety, Seating. I need to find "Heated Seats" which is likely under "Seating" and "Premium Sound System" which is likely under "Entertainment". Let me first click on "Seating" to expand it and find heated seats.
The "Seating" section is expanded and I can see "All seating features" is checked. Let me scroll down to see the individual seating options, especially "Heated Seats".

I can see the Seating section expanded with "Leather Seats (61)" and "Memory Seat (20)". I don't see "Heated Seats" yet - I need to scroll down a little more to see if there are more options under Seating.

I can see the Seating section only has "Leather Seats (61)" and "Memory Seat (20)". I don't see a specific "Heated Seats" option here. The heated seats might be under "Convenience" instead. Let me also look for "Premium Sound System" under "Entertainment". Let me first click on "Convenience" to expand it.
I can see "Heated Seats (65)" under Convenience. Let me click on it to select it. I also see "Entertainment" below - I'll need to expand that next for the Premium Sound System.

"Heated Seats (65)" is now checked (I can see the blue checkbox). The results are updating to show cars with heated seats. Now I need to expand the "Entertainment" section and select "Premium Sound System". Let me click on "Entertainment".
I can see "Entertainment" is now expanded (with the up arrow). Let me scroll down to see the Entertainment options including "Premium Sound System".

I can see the Convenience section is showing all its options (with "Heated Seats (65)" checked), and the "Entertainment" section is at the bottom. Let me scroll down more to see the Entertainment options.
I can see the Entertainment section is now expanded with options like Android Auto, Apple CarPlay, Bluetooth, CD Player. I need to scroll down a bit more to find "Premium Sound System".
I can see the Entertainment section with Android Auto, Apple CarPlay, Bluetooth, CD Player, DVD Player. I need to scroll down more to find "Premium Sound System".
I can see "Premium Sound System (31)" in the Entertainment section. Let me click on it to select it.

"Premium Sound System (31)" is now checked. All my filters are applied:
- Used cars
- Hatchback body style
- Black interior
- Heated Seats
- Premium Sound System
- Near Madison, WI (53703)

Now I need to sort by price (lowest first) to find the cheapest listing. Let me scroll up to the top to find the sort option.

I can see the page now shows "Used hatchbacks for sale near Madison, WI" with 31 results, and the active filters are: Used, Hatchback, Black Interior, Heated Seats, Premium Sound System. Now I need to sort by price (lowest first). Let me click on "Sort: Best match" to change the sorting.
I can see the sort dropdown with options. Let me select "Lowest price".
